hook.summary: A rooster stands at the edge of a busy highway, preparing to cross.
hook.visual_action: The rooster is stationary on the sidewalk while cars speed past in the background.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Go down deh, wine and go down deh

scene_flow: The rooster waits on the sidewalk as heavy traffic passes by.
The rooster enters the road and dodges a green SUV and a yellow car.
The rooster navigates through the middle lanes, narrowly avoiding a red sports car and a police vehicle.
The rooster successfully crosses all lanes and reaches the safety of the grassy median.
audience_proxy: Casual gamers who enjoy simple, high-stakes survival challenges and arcade-style gameplay.
